scripts.publish:public: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @micrographics/core publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/tailwind publish --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:paid: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @micrographics/react publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/vue publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/svelte publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/vanilla publish --no-git-checks
